D1 Optics L2 Understand Reference

Inverse Square Law

slide the sensor away from the lamp and watch illuminance fall as 1/r²

A point source spreads its energy onto ever-larger spheres, so illuminance falls as the inverse square of distance.

Slide the sensor outward. Watch the rays spread, the red marker slide along the 1/r² curve, and the illuminance readout drop quadratically.
